description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §2.1, §8.1 block_rec.

Work:
- Term::TailCall { fn, args }: return_call %fn(args..., k) — forward current cont SSA.
- Term::TailCallClosure { f, args }: v_code = load f+16; return_call_indirect sig_closure_N(args..., f, k).

Acceptance:
- count block_rec matches §8.1 target: zero fz_alloc_* in body, ends in return_call %count(v_n1, v_acc1, v_k).
- tail_recursion fixture runs 100k iterations, prints 100000, RSS flat.
title: fz-cps.1.c: TailCall/TailCallClosure forward cont
